title: fibichia umbellata
intro: Fibichia umbellata, also known as the golden button, is a flowering plant species native to China and India, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers arranged in clusters. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fibichia umbellata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Fibichia umbellata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used for medicinal purposes.
